data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. SILKY SETH improved at Ballarat and missed by a head over 1400m at Ballarat following. He will hit this at peak and has the gate speed to cross over and position on-pace. Comes back in grade and will be tough to beat. 7. THE MAILER made good ground beaten only 0.8 lengths over 1412m this track and trip and will be better for it. The rail may not be ideal but he has the blinkers on for the first time and won't have to improve much to feature. 3. JOHN IN ENGLISH finished fourth at Kyneton over 1208m, beaten 3.5 lengths. Should progress from that outing and is an each-way hope. 2. IRON STUPA peaks and is heading in the right direction. Has the blinkers on for the first time and Newitt rides from a soft barrier.","runners":[5,7,3,2],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ECHUCA-R3-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
